BackstoryDef.title: recruit
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enlisted in the military of a city state. [PAWN_pronoun] soon found [PAWN_possessive]self on the frontlines, fighting against enemies of the state. The military training helped [PAWN_pronoun] grow into a competent warrior.

BackstoryDef.title: eager recruit
BackstoryDef.description: Civilian life never really suited [PAWN_nameDef], who quickly grew bored with [PAWN_possessive] mundane routine. When war broke out, [PAWN_pronoun] jumped at the chance to serve [PAWN_possessive] country.

BackstoryDef.title: slacker
BackstoryDef.description: With no other life prospects, [PAWN_pronoun] enlisted in the military. [PAWN_possessive] lazy nature and lack of discipline often earned [PAWN_objective] the ire of [PAWN_possessive] superiors.

BackstoryDef.title: dull troop
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] joined the military of a city state. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in the field but found that [PAWN_pronoun] lacked the charisma needed to lead others.

BackstoryDef.title: combat mechanic
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was employed by the military of a city state as a mechanic and spent much of [PAWN_possessive] career maintaining the various vehicles and weapons used by the forces.

BackstoryDef.title: combat engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] briefly worked as an engineer before being recruited by the military of a city state. Digging trenches and building fortifications proved to be much more physically demanding than the design work [PAWN_pronoun] performed prior to enlisting.\n\nA series of failed missions left [PAWN_nameDef] with pyrophobia and a strong desire to avoid plants.

BackstoryDef.title: petty officer
BackstoryDef.description: Although lacking any real combat training, [PAWN_nameDef] was able to use [PAWN_possessive] charisma and wits to earn a commission as a petty officer in the military of a city state. [PAWN_possessive] ability to quickly analyze and adapt to changing situations proved invaluable in the field.

BackstoryDef.title: psychopath
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] developed sociopathic tendencies during [PAWN_possessive] time in the military. [PAWN_possessive] unhinged behavior and complete lack of regard for human life was sweeped under the rug by [PAWN_possessive] superiors due to [PAWN_possessive] excellent performance as a soldier.

BackstoryDef.title: army scout
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited by the cavalry divison of the military of a city state. [PAWN_pronoun] proved a natural scout, able to traverse rough terrain with ease.

BackstoryDef.title: surveyor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited by the intelligence divison of a city state military. [PAWN_pronoun] made maps and gathered intelligence about possible conquests.\n\n[PAWN_nameDef] was raised by devout luddites and was taught to depend on [PAWN_possessive] own strength instead of fancy gizmos. Although [PAWN_pronoun] has abandoned [PAWN_possessive] strict upbringing, [PAWN_pronoun] still struggles to comprehend even the simplest machines.

BackstoryDef.title: logistician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] developed a knack for paperwork, and [PAWN_pronoun] eventually joined the military as a logistician. [PAWN_possessive] great memory and attention to detail made [PAWN_objective] invaluable to [PAWN_possessive] superiors.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] was also infamous in [PAWN_possessive] logistics company for [PAWN_possessive] casual disdain for grunt work.

BackstoryDef.title: trauma troop
BackstoryDef.description: War was never kind to [PAWN_nameDef]. [PAWN_pronoun] lost many friends in raids and blamed [PAWN_objective]self for being unable to save them. [PAWN_possessive] determination to protect those around [PAWN_objective] led [PAWN_objective] to join the military.

BackstoryDef.title: mercenary
BackstoryDef.description: Militaries of city states generally include some sort of mercenary attachment and [PAWN_nameDef] was a part of one such unit. From protecting convoys to hunting down wanted fugitives, [PAWN_possessive] mercenary company saw action on a regular basis.\n\nThe constant violence [PAWN_nameDef] experienced left [PAWN_objective] mentally scarred.

BackstoryDef.title: improv chef
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made a name for [PAWN_objective]self in the military of a city state for being an excellent cook. Although [PAWN_pronoun] never officially received any culinary training, [PAWN_possessive] ability to make the most of what little rations [PAWN_pronoun] had available made [PAWN_objective] popular among [PAWN_possessive] comrades.\n\nAlthough [PAWN_pronoun] was an excellent chef, [PAWN_pronoun] was absolutely incapable of preparing the ingredients required to prepare a meal. [PAWN_pronoun] once hurt themselves while trying to gather herbs.

BackstoryDef.title: rationmonger
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was contracted by the military of a city state to manage the distribution of rations. Although [PAWN_pronoun] had no experience in logistics, [PAWN_pronoun] quickly rose through the ranks thanks to [PAWN_possessive] ability to keep troops happy and well fed.

BackstoryDef.title: veteran
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a mercenary under the employ of the military of a city state until [PAWN_pronoun] was discharged due to a minor injury sustained in combat. With years of experience in the field, [PAWN_pronoun] was able to secure a petty position in the same army after [PAWN_possessive] recovery.\n\nWith [PAWN_possessive] dedicated to combat, [PAWN_nameDef] had no time to spend on creative prospects.

BackstoryDef.title: jaded veteran
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s unit was disgraced after a series of mutinies led to the murder of an esteemed commander. [PAWN_nameDef] was not involved in the plot but [PAWN_pronoun] was still demoted due to [PAWN_possessive] affiliation with the disgraced unit. This left [PAWN_objective] bitter and resentful.

BackstoryDef.title: drifter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] never figured out what to do with [PAWN_possessive] life. [PAWN_pronoun] traveled often, taking up casual work wherever [PAWN_pronoun] found it.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] eventually enlisted in the military of a city state.

BackstoryDef.title: cavalry snob
BackstoryDef.description: Even as mounted cavalry became a rare sight on the battlefield, some militaries continued to maintain such a division to preserve the tradition. [PAWN_nameDef] joined one such force and quickly became a proficient rider and lancer.\n\n[PAWN_possessive] comrades were mostly made up of privileged sons and daughters from influential families, and [PAWN_nameDef] soon fell into that crowd. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to enjoy the finer things in life and absolutely abhorred anything that could be considered low-class.

BackstoryDef.title: pariah
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured by an enemy military during a border skirmish. The enemy used [PAWN_objective] as a plaything and forced [PAWN_objective] into all manner of debauchery. When [PAWN_pronoun] returned to [PAWN_possessive] unit, [PAWN_pronoun] was blamed for the entire incident. This left [PAWN_objective] deeply ashamed and with a strong sense of self-loathing.

BackstoryDef.title: slowpoke
BackstoryDef.description: The war that had defined [PAWN_nameDef]'s life came to an end and an extended period of peace ensued. This time of inactivity left [PAWN_objective] lazy and apathetic.

BackstoryDef.title: drunk milita
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the member of a town millita that was rarely, if ever, called upon to perform their actual duty. The unit mostly sat around, drank and got into brawls while enjoying the benefits of their cushy job.

BackstoryDef.title: mechfighter
BackstoryDef.description: Mechanoids are a constant threat out in the Rimworlds and [PAWN_nameDef] served in the military of a city state as a part of a reaction force, tasked with responding to mechanoid raids out in the frontier towns. The constant stress and danger took a toll on [PAWN_possessive] mental health and left [PAWN_pronoun] a volatile, paranoid shell of [PAWN_possessive] former self.

BackstoryDef.title: former sailor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] signed up to be a sailor in the navy of a city state. [PAWN_pronoun] spent most of [PAWN_possessive] time doing menial tasks and rarely got to see any actual action.\n\nA minor combat injury saw [PAWN_nameDef] reassigned to the frontlines with a petty officer rank.

BackstoryDef.title: war hermit
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was considered to be quite deranged. Even those under [PAWN_possessive] command thought [PAWN_possessive] odd. [PAWN_pronoun] would often make claims of having been blessed by some deity or another. These claims were dismissed by [PAWN_possessive] superiors, who attributed it to the stresses of war.

BackstoryDef.title: mafia boss
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a high-ranking member of a mafia family. The family was forced to go legit after their assets were seized by the authorities and [PAWN_nameDef] was sent away to a penal colony.\n\nAfter [PAWN_possessive] release, [PAWN_pronoun] found that [PAWN_pronoun] was unable to fit back into civilian life and joined the military. This experience did little to temper [PAWN_possessive] violent streak.

BackstoryDef.title: straight rat
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up as a member of a minor street gang in a big city. [PAWN_pronoun] saw an opportunity to go straight when the military came knocking, looking for volunteers.\n\nIn the military, [PAWN_nameDef] was unable to think for herself and blindly followed orders without question.

BackstoryDef.title: eltex miner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a prospecting company specializing in excavating the remains of ancient ruins. [PAWN_pronoun] was tasked with clearing rubble and recovering whatever useful items [PAWN_pronoun] could find.\n\n[PAWN_nameDef] was left unemployed after [PAWN_possessive] hometown was devastated by raiders. Unable to find work, [PAWN_pronoun] used what remained of [PAWN_possessive] old contacts to join the military of a city state. [PAWN_possessive] experience with excavation made [PAWN_possessive] an excellent sapper.

BackstoryDef.title: interrogator
BackstoryDef.description: Working for a tyrannical city state, [PAWN_nameDef] earned a reputation as an expert in 'persuasion.' Any prisoner who went down into the dungeons left with no secrets - and with [PAWN_nameDef]'s smile permanently scarred into their nightmares.

BackstoryDef.title: forced recruit
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s hometown was invaded by a neighbouring city state. [PAWN_pronoun], along with a few other survivors, were conscripted by the victorious invaders and shipped off to the frontlines.\n\n[PAWN_nameDef] struggled to get along with [PAWN_possessive] unit and developed a strong contempt for everyone and everything.

BackstoryDef.title: mercenary chef
BackstoryDef.description: A small mercenary company hired [PAWN_nameDef] to serve as a cook for the crew. [PAWN_pronoun] was treated well and was eventually allowed to accompany them on missions.\n\nThe wild escapades [PAWN_nameDef]'s mercenary company had earned [PAWN_objective] a reputation as a troublemaker.

BackstoryDef.title: daredevil
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had a certain... craving for pain. [PAWN_objective] tastes grew more and more extreme and the only way [PAWN_pronoun] could find release was by engaging in increasingly dangerous activities. This culminated in [PAWN_objective] joining the military, where [PAWN_pronoun] could inflict pain upon others for a living.

BackstoryDef.title: failed artist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] dedicated [PAWN_possessive] early adulthood to studying the arts. [PAWN_pronoun] loved nothing more than to spend [PAWN_possessive] days sculpting.\n\nUnfortunately, [PAWN_pronoun] wasn't very good at it. [PAWN_pronoun] was forced to give up [PAWN_possessive] passion and enlist in the military.

BackstoryDef.title: murderer
BackstoryDef.description: Everyone has a hobby that they enjoy. Some take up tailoring or sculpting, while others prefer gardening or hunting. [PAWN_nameDef]'s favorite pastime was murder.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] was forced to flee [PAWN_possessive] home and seek refuge in a nearby city state after [PAWN_possessive] secret hobby was discovered. From there, the miltiary seemed like the natural next step.

BackstoryDef.title: mad hatter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] won't say what [PAWN_possessive] previous occupation was, but it seems to have been something that slowly drove [PAWN_objective] mad. [PAWN_pronoun] frequently has moments of brilliance inbetween bouts of insanity.

BackstoryDef.title: arsonist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] developed an affinity for fire. Whether it was a candle, a campfire, or a raging inferno, [PAWN_pronoun] found joy in flames. [PAWN_pronoun] was soon setting fire to everything and anything.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] was eventually recruited into the military as a saboteur, where [PAWN_possessive] love for fire would be put to good use.

BackstoryDef.title: ideological extremist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] bought into the propaganda of a radical extremist movement and spent [PAWN_possessive] youth fighting for its cause. [PAWN_pronoun] believed [PAWN_possessive] country had become degenerate and had abandoned its noble ideals. [PAWN_pronoun] eagerly enlisted in the military in an attempt to 'restore the purity' of [PAWN_possessive] homeland.

BackstoryDef.title: cannibal
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was indoctrinated by a cult of cannibals. The taste sparked a hunger within [PAWN_objective] that could only be sated by the flesh of [PAWN_possessive] fellow humans.\n\nA social enforcement raid eventually forced the group to disband. With no other life prospects, [PAWN_nameDef] joined the military. [PAWN_pronoun] did [PAWN_possessive] best to keep [PAWN_possessive] urges in check but [PAWN_possessive] desire to devour human flesh never truly went away.

BackstoryDef.title: town drunk
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a no-good hooligan who loved nothing more than getting into fights. The local social enforcement unit got fed up with [PAWN_possessive] antics and shipped [PAWN_objective] off to a military academy, hoping the discipline would knock some sense into [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: insect fighter
BackstoryDef.description: Insectoid swarms are a common threat out in the frontier towns and [PAWN_nameDef]'s hometown was no exception. [PAWN_pronoun] enlisted in the local militia to help defend [PAWN_possessive] home from the constant attacks.\n\nThe trauma of witnessing the destruction caused by an insectoid swarm left [PAWN_nameDef] with a crippling fear of all animals.

BackstoryDef.title: reservist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enlisted in the military of a city state and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] time in the reserves. Weeks spent doing nothing but waiting for the call to arms left [PAWN_possessive] lazy and entitled.

BackstoryDef.title: runaway
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was persecuted for [PAWN_possessive] sexuality and eventually fled [PAWN_possessive] hometown. [PAWN_pronoun] took refuge in a nearby city state and eventually joined the military, hoping to make a better life for [PAWN_objective]self.\n\nThe trauma [PAWN_nameDef] suffered left her emotionally scarred.

BackstoryDef.title: ring fighter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] early youth bouncing around various underground boxing circuits. [PAWN_possessive] career was cut short when [PAWN_pronoun] was seriously injured during a fight and [PAWN_pronoun] was forced to enlist in the military to pay [PAWN_possessive] her medical debts.\n\nYears of violence and death hardened [PAWN_nameDef]. The thrill of the fight soon subsumed all of [PAWN_possessive] other interests.

BackstoryDef.title: civil servant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was bureaucrat in the civil service of a city state. [PAWN_possessive] cushy job afforded [PAWN_objective] a comfortable lifestyle, which she was all too eager to enjoy. This sheltered, comfortable life made [PAWN_objective] complacent and unwilling to accept any hardships.\n\nA series of scandals and corruption investigations saw [PAWN_possessive] department disbanded. Facing a bleak future, [PAWN_nameDef] chose to join the military, hoping it would allow [PAWN_objective] to live the comfortable life she had grown accustomed to.

BackstoryDef.title: gloomy troop
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a common laborer and lived a fairly unremarkable life until a tragedy left [PAWN_objective] homeless and destitute. [PAWN_pronoun] eventually ended up joining the military of [PAWN_possessive] city state.\n\n[PAWN_nameDef]'s past is constantly a source of stress and anguish. [PAWN_pronoun] struggles to move on and frequently has nightmares about the horrors [PAWN_pronoun] experienced.

BackstoryDef.title: shellshock
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited into the military at a young age and grew up with a rifle in hand. \n\n[PAWN_possessive] training could not have prepared [PAWN_pronoun] for the horrors of war, however. A series of brutal engagements left [PAWN_objective] shell-shocked. [PAWN_pronoun] coped with the death of [PAWN_possessive] comrades by distancing [PAWN_objective]self from others so that [PAWN_pronoun] would not have to mourn anyone again.

BackstoryDef.title: hopeful recruit
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived in the slums of a city state. [PAWN_possessive] life was full of hardship and suffering but [PAWN_pronoun] never gave up hope.\n\nOne day, a military recruiter came knocking at [PAWN_possessive] door and offered her a way out. [PAWN_pronoun] signed up on the spot.

BackstoryDef.title: psycho mercenary
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] teenage years as a mercenary, working for whoever paid [PAWN_objective] the most. The constant death and pain [PAWN_pronoun] experienced left [PAWN_objective] numb and detached.
